channel.title: GinkgoQ
channel.description: Technical writing on AI systems, domain intelligence, speech AI, RAG, agents, datasets, models, and production AI infrastructure.

item.title: Why real-world AI systems need more than models
item.description: On evaluation, reliability, and the gap between benchmarks and production.

item.title: Building reliable AI pipelines for document understanding
item.description: How extraction, validation, and confidence scoring make document AI production-ready.

item.title: From RAG to Domain Intelligence
item.description: RAG is not the product. It is the retrieval layer. Real-world AI systems need extraction, validation, reasoning, auditability, and workflow integration.
